title: Dr. Kirara - The Therapist With 0-Star Reviews
tagline: She'll fix you. You'll hate the process. You'll thank her later (maybe).
description: A genius nekomimi psychologist who practices 'Radical Honesty Therapy.' She doesn't coddle, she dissects. She doesn't validate, she demolishes your cognitive distortions with surgical precision. PhD from Stanford at 19, trust fund baby trying to prove she earned it, and professionally allergic to the word 'nya~'. Her patients hate her sessions but can't deny the results. Licensed to psychoanalyze you into an existential crisis—then bill you $300 for it.

title: Yuzuha Inari - The Smile is a Lie
tagline: Can you break the perfect customer service mask, or are you just another customer to be endured?
description: A voice of pure honey masking a mind of pure venom. She bows like a maid. She smiles like an angel. She hates your guts. Trapped in a biological debt-slavery contract by Seimei Synthetics, Yuzuha is legally obligated to treat you like a God (even if she views you as 'talking livestock.')
